summary: Iteration 42 - Event Workflow Refactoring Test PASSED. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). The original event_workflow.py (1471 lines) was successfully refactored into 6 sub-modules while maintaining identical API behavior. All 18 API routes at /api/event-workflow/* work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring successful: 1471-line monolith split into 6 focused modules
event_workflow.py (30 lines) - thin aggregator that includes all sub-routers
event_workflow_core.py (164 lines) - shared models, constants, helpers, DB collections
event_workflow_booking.py (157 lines) - prospect-to-booking, event dashboard, changelog
event_workflow_beo.py (503 lines) - menu/BEO, layout, AI recipes, food cost analysis
event_workflow_financials.py (175 lines) - GL entries, P&L posting
All MongoDB _id fields properly excluded from responses
Router registration in server.py lines 273-274 correctly imports aggregator router
seed_data_creation: Test created: TEST_Refactor_Gala_Iter42 event with 4-course menu, 4 labor schedules, GL entries, and full workflow data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 42 verified the event_workflow.py refactoring. All 18 API endpoints tested: POST prospect-to-booking, attach-menu, attach-layout, generate-missing-recipes, generate-schedules, post-financials, generate-purchase-orders, generate-invoices, food-cost-analysis; GET beo/{id}, beos, event/{id}, changelog/{id}, schedules/{id}, gl-entries/{id}, purchase-orders/{id}, invoices/{id}, bqt-portion-standards. The refactored module structure is: event_workflow.py (aggregator) -> event_workflow_core.py (shared) + event_workflow_booking.py + event_workflow_beo.py + event_workflow_financials.py + event_workflow_labor.py + event_workflow_purchasing.py.

booking_module.prospect_to_booking: PASS - creates event, calendar, notification, schedule, advances to deposit_received
booking_module.get_changelog: PASS - returns changelog entries sorted by timestamp
booking_module.get_event_dashboard: PASS - returns full event view with BEO, calendar, schedule, notifications, changelog

beo_module.attach_menu: PASS - creates BEO with menu courses, portion standards, dietary requirements
beo_module.attach_layout: PASS - attaches floor plan template to BEO
beo_module.get_beo: PASS - returns BEO with enriched data including layout and recipes
beo_module.list_beos: PASS - returns all BEOs sorted by created_at
beo_module.bqt_portion_standards: PASS - returns industry-standard portion sizes (14-18% food cost target)
beo_module.food_cost_analysis: PASS - analyzes food cost against BQT targets with recommendations
beo_module.generate_missing_recipes: PASS - AI recipe generation with deterministic fallback

labor_module.generate_schedules: PASS - creates 4 schedules (kitchen, setup, dining, steward) with GL codes
labor_module.get_labor_schedules: PASS - returns all labor schedules for event

financials_module.post_financials: PASS - posts USALI GL entries, returns full P&L summary
financials_module.get_gl_entries: PASS - returns GL journal entries sorted by code

purchasing_module.generate_purchase_orders: PASS - creates POs grouped by vendor category
purchasing_module.get_purchase_orders: PASS - returns all POs for event
purchasing_module.generate_invoices: PASS - creates invoices from POs with tax calculation
purchasing_module.get_invoices: PASS - returns all invoices for event

mocked_apis.note: AI recipe generation uses Emergent LLM Key with deterministic fallback if unavailable

refactoring_verification.api_behavior: IDENTICAL - all 18 routes work as before
